name: Xrf Scientific Limited
analysis: XRF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.8500, stop A$1.7721, target A$2.2000 (4.49:1) — then trail it.
